title: Retro Pixel Art Game Scene
promptText: A detailed pixel art scene in the style of [ERA_REFERENCE] era video games depicting [SCENE_DESCRIPTION]. [PIXEL_DENSITY] pixel density with a limited [COLOR_COUNT]-color palette using [COLOR_STYLE] colors. The scene includes [FOREGROUND_ELEMENTS] in the foreground and [BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS] in the background with parallax depth layers. Dithering technique for shading and gradients. Small animated-looking details like [ANIMATED_DETAILS]. Clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing. Nostalgic retro gaming aesthetic with modern composition sensibility.
description: Pixel art is experiencing a massive revival in indie game development, merchandise design, and digital nostalgia culture. This prompt captures the specific technical constraints that define authentic pixel art: limited color palettes, dithering instead of smooth gradients, clean pixel edges without anti-aliasing, and parallax-ready layer composition. The era reference parameter lets you target specific aesthetic generations from 8-bit NES to 16-bit SNES to early PC gaming. Use these for game development concept art, social media profile art, merchandise designs, or animated GIF backgrounds.

variables.name: ERA_REFERENCE
variables.description: The era of pixel art to emulate

variables.name: SCENE_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: a cozy ramen shop on a rainy cyberpunk street at night

variables.name: COLOR_COUNT
variables.description: Number of colors in the palette

variables.name: COLOR_STYLE
variables.example: warm neon with cool blue shadows

variables.name: FOREGROUND_ELEMENTS
variables.description: Objects in the front of the scene
variables.example: steaming ramen bowls on a counter, a cat sitting on a stool

variables.name: BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS
variables.example: rain-streaked windows, neon signs in Japanese, passing hover-cars

variables.name: ANIMATED_DETAILS
variables.example: steam rising from bowls, rain droplets on the window, flickering neon sign

tips: Use 'negative prompt: smooth, gradient, 3D, photorealistic, blurry' for cleaner pixel results
Specify exact pixel canvas size like '320x180' for game-ready dimensions
Request tileable versions for use as game backgrounds
exampleOutput: A 16-bit SNES-style pixel art scene of a cozy ramen shop interior at night. A counter with steaming pixel-art ramen bowls in warm orange and yellow. A small pixel cat sits on a stool. Through rain-streaked windows, neon signs glow in pink and blue. 24-color palette with warm neons and cool blue shadows. Dithered shading on all surfaces. Clean pixel edges throughout.
metaTitle: Retro Pixel Art Game Scene for Stable Diffusion
metaDescription: Create authentic retro pixel art scenes for games and digital art. Try this Stable Diffusion prompt for nostalgic 8-bit and 16-bit aesthetics.
